content:
We will have State of the Map Baltics in Rīga this year :tada:
It will happen on 4 June 2026 at Jelgavas iela 1, as a part of Baltic Geospatial Information Technology Conference.
Please, go register for attendance, and submit your talks!

Jelgavas iela 1 in where?

I mean, I assume Riga, but it would be hilarious if someone showed up in like Daugavpils :upside_down:

https://2026.sotm-baltics.org/riga.html

It is pretty new, looks excellent both from the inside and the outside, but also quite inconveniently located behind the railway ten minutes by walking from the National Library.

Did this mean "conveniently"?

Jelgavas iela 1 in where?

In Rīga =)
What is it about Zulip that I constantly fail to read words. Like I even double-checked you didn't mention it somewhere and I still missed it...
Don't know! I mean this happens to me all the time elsewhere, but specifically on Zulip I feel more focused for some reason)
Probably something to do with, hmm, status, I guess. I feel myself like a newcomer, still.

Hey! SOTMB 2026 strauji tuvojas, un ceram tur sastapt daudz OSM kartētājus un interesentus. Noteikti paziņojiet skolotājiem, studentiem un skolēniem, kurus interesē atvērta kartēšana, jo tā ir burvīga iespēja dzirdēt interesantus stāstus un apspriesties klātienē.

Atgādinājums - tiem, kuri plāno piedalīties, jāreģistrējas te: https://balticgitconf.eu/registration/ .
